title: Wallet Resource Packs
description: Dependent resource pack for Wallet datapack
body:
# General information
This is a dependent resource pack for the Wallet datapack, it adds texture replacement through a custommodeldata 
the datapack itself [(click here)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wallet)
## Textures that it adds
